title: WF-005 upload — staff upload question-paper sets (A-D) + blank answer/OMR sheet for time-gated school download
business_reason: The secure time-gated school DOWNLOAD existed (FR-MATERIAL-RELEASE-0018), but there was no way to UPLOAD the actual content: the generated file-create took a pre-existing file_ref. Staff need to upload the question-paper sets and the blank answer/OMR sheet so there is real material to release + download.

design.upload: POST /api/staff/exams/materials/upload — body {package_id, file_type (question_paper|answer_sheet|cover_sheet), set_code (A-D, REQUIRED for question_paper), content (base64), encoding}. storeFile -> PRIVATE 'exam-material-files' bucket -> file_ref; inserts exam_material_files (file_code encodes the set: MQP-SET<A-D>- / MAS- ; file_hash, file_size_bytes, file_status generated). GET ?package_id= lists a package's files.
design.download: unchanged — the existing /api/school/materials/[fileId]/download applies packageReleaseGate (released package + release_at passed, own-school, not revoked/superseded) + a short-lived signed URL. An uploaded file under a released package is downloadable time-gated.
design.ui: /staff/exams/materials/upload page (package picker + file_type + set + PDF file input -> base64; lists the package's files), nav via STAFF_CUSTOM_NAV.

param_14.question: How do the question papers (4 sets) and blank answer sheets get to schools?
param_14.answer: Staff upload the 4 question-paper sets (A-D) and the blank answer/OMR sheet into the school's material package; each PDF is stored privately and recorded as an exam_material_file. Once the package is released (release_at), the school downloads each as a time-gated PDF via a short-lived signed URL (own-school only, audited). A question paper must specify its set; the answer sheet is the blank OMR template.
param_14.answer_source: upload route + exam_material_files + packageReleaseGate + the secure school download
param_14.security_implications: content stored PRIVATELY (never a raw path); download only after release + within own school; signed URL short-lived; every upload + download audited; set encoded in the file code.
param_14.approval_implications: release follows the package lifecycle (generate -> approve [dual] -> release [dual]); files are downloadable only under a released package.
param_14.downstream_dependencies: a download WINDOW END (expires_at on exam_material_packages) for a true open/close window; per-set school assignment; watermark-per-school on the PDF; MIME/size validation of the PDF beyond the global body-size cap.
